title: Gold Ship Horse Armor
description: Restyles Copper Horse Armor to a design inspired by Umamusume: Pretty Derby
body:
Reskins Copper Horse Armor to resemble the outfit worn by Gold Ship by Umamusume: Pretty Derby. Also renames the item to "Goldship Horse Armor". Feeling unsinkable with that extra 4 (![Seriously, copper armor sucks.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3d03b815bee65caa2979a246e63f4c36841f814.png)![Seriously, copper armor sucks.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3d03b815bee65caa2979a246e63f4c36841f814.png)) armor points?

![Horsing around.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4c25c0e669964c0684a22fd0f0e241dce318f10_0.webp)

_Optifine/EMF not required._
